en.text: or ; (Nehemiah 3:5), or lemma צַוָּרן missing vowel, corrected to צַוָּרֹן; (Song of Solomon 4:9), or (feminine) ; (Micah 2:3), intensively from H6696 in the sense of binding; the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound)
